title: How to delete workspace using API
excerpt: I wondering there is how to delete workspace using Monday developer’s API’s.

posts.author: thlee (Taeho Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: I wondering there is how to delete workspace using Monday developer’s API’s.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @thlee and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today there is no mutation for deleting a workspace using the API.

Cheers,
Matias
